mapper.insert:
insert into song_application(application_id, artist_id, song_type, song_name, song_url, language, tag_ids, singer_ids,lyricist_ids,composer_ids,duration, lyrics, album_id, applied_at, status) values
(#{item.applicationId}, #{item.artistId}, #{item.songType}, #{item.songName}, #{item.songUrl}, #{item.language}, #{item.tagIds},#{item.singerIds},#{item.lyricistIds},#{item.composerIds}, #{item.duration}, #{item.lyrics}, #{item.albumId}, #{item.appliedAt},#{item.status})
